g.text: Attention as a weighted average — keys, values, queries
Dot-product all queries with all keys
QKᵀ gives a similarity score between every query–key pair.
For large d_k the dot products grow large, pushing softmax
into low-gradient regions. Scaling counteracts that.
Normalize each row so the weights over keys sum to 1.
Multiply weights by V to get each output position's vector.
Source: Vaswani et al. 2017, §3.2.1 Scaled Dot-Product Attention
